description:
You are an intelligence analyst investigating a corporate entity using an email archive from a seized server. Create a forensic case in Autopsy named 'Network_Analysis_2024' with case number 'INV-NET-010' and analyze the data source at /home/ga/evidence/corporate_emails.mbox using only the Email Parser ingest module. Identify the top three most active email addresses by total message volume (sent and received). Write an intelligence report to /home/ga/Reports/communicator_analysis.txt using exactly this structure:

CASE_NAME: Network_Analysis_2024
TOTAL_EMAILS_PARSED: <total>
TOP_COMMUNICATORS:
1. <email1> | <count1>
2. <
